# Data Directory

This directory contains raw and processed earthquake catalog data. Data files are not tracked by git due to their size.

## Files (generated by pipeline)

| File | Description | Script |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `ridgecrest_catalog.gpkg` | Raw USGS catalog (M≥1.5, Jul 2019 – Jan 2020) | `01_download_catalog.py` |
| `ridgecrest_catalog.csv` | Same catalog as CSV | `01_download_catalog.py` |
| `ridgecrest_faults.gpkg` | USGS Quaternary Fault traces (clipped) | `01_download_catalog.py` |
| `ridgecrest_catalog_analyzed.gpkg` | Catalog with fault distances added | `02_analyze_sequence.py` |

## Data Sources

- **Earthquake catalog:** USGS FDSN Web Service — https://earthquake.usgs.gov/fdsnws/event/1/
- **Fault traces:** USGS Quaternary Fault and Fold Database — https://www.usgs.gov/programs/earthquake-hazards/faults
- **Moment tensor:** USGS NEIC — https://earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/eventpage/ci38457511

## Catalog Statistics (expected)

- Total M≥1.5 events: ~27,000
- Time span: 2019-07-01 to 2020-01-01 (184 days)
- Depth range: 0–25 km
- Magnitude range: 1.5–7.1
